allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "f:\\projects\\My projects\\AI-Telecaller\\backend"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe" -ArgumentList "app.main:app","--port","8123" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8123/health; $l = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8123/live; $ping = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8123/api/v1/ping; "health: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; "live: $\($l | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; "ping: $\($ping | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; try { Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8123/ready } catch { "ready \(expected 503 without Postgres\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" } } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force })
